benefits.description: Lost 40 lbs of fat over ~9-month deficit
Gained 10 lbs of muscle over ~9-month deficit
Feels like a 25 year old again; significant energy improvement
Happiness and general wellbeing greatly improved
Reta crushes appetite; too much suppression at times requiring maintenance breaks

side_effects.description: Appetite suppression so strong that eating at maintenance became difficult; advised taking breaks from Reta after ~6 months

protocol_notes: OP started testosterone at 170mg/week and increased to 300mg/week (described as a 'cruise'). Retatrutide started at 0.5mg/week and titrated up to 4mg/week. Was pinning daily and later learned that was suboptimal. Diet focused heavily on protein (chicken, protein shakes, protein bars, fruit). About 4 months on Retatrutide, ~9 months total on the combined protocol. Recommends taking a break after ~6 months on Reta.
